service.description: Execute a GraphQL query. Returns the Shopify-shaped envelope: data, errors (each {message, extensions.code}), and extensions.cost.

actions.script: def result = new org.moqui.gql.GqlEngine(ec).execute(query, (Map) variables, operationName) data = result.data errors = result.errors extensions = result.extensions

service.description: PUBLIC GraphQL endpoint — a SEPARATE auth realm from execute#Query. Authentication is API-KEY ONLY: the key is read from the request header (Authorization: Bearer <key>, or X-Darpan-Gql-Key). A request carrying ONLY a Moqui session (login_key) and NO API key is REJECTED here. SECURITY/fail-closed: if there is no web context, no key, or the key is invalid/ expired/disabled, an auth error is returned and the query NEVER runs. On a valid key the engine runs with the key's FIXED tenant scope (DarpanTenantScopeFilter(companyUserGroupId)) and cost profile — never the session/TenantAccessSupport path. Same {data, errors, extensions} envelope.
Published GraphQL SDL for the curated read schema.

Retention purge for query-log v2: deletes GqlQueryLog raw rows older than retainDays and GqlQueryStatsBin rows whose binStartDate is older than binRetainDays (defaults from the gql.queryLog.retainDays / gql.queryLog.binRetainDays properties). Run daily by the purge_GqlQueryLog ServiceJob; GqlQueryShape rows are kept (tiny, one per distinct shape).

actions.script: int rd = retainDays != null ? retainDays as int : (System.getProperty("gql.queryLog.retainDays") ?: "90") as int int brd = binRetainDays != null ? binRetainDays as int : (System.getProperty("gql.queryLog.binRetainDays") ?: "365") as int java.sql.Timestamp rawCutoff = new java.sql.Timestamp(System.currentTimeMillis() - rd * 86400000L) java.sql.Timestamp binCutoff = new java.sql.Timestamp(System.currentTimeMillis() - brd * 86400000L) rawPurged = ec.entity.find("moqui.gql.GqlQueryLog") .condition("queryDate", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.LESS_THAN, rawCutoff).deleteAll() binsPurged = ec.entity.find("moqui.gql.GqlQueryStatsBin") .condition("binStartDate", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.LESS_THAN, binCutoff).deleteAll() ec.logger.info("gql purge#QueryLog: removed ${rawPurged} raw rows (>${rd}d), ${binsPurged} bins (>${brd}d)")
